title: Verify existing implementation of breadcrumb component
description: The Breadcrumb component already exists at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx with proper implementation (items prop with { label, href }[], active last item as plain text, others as links) and unit tests at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx. Verified implementation matches requirements.
existing_patterns: src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx implements BreadcrumbProps interface with items array of { label: string; href?: string }, uses Link from next/link for navigable items, renders last item as plain text span with active class
src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx uses vitest describe/it pattern with @testing-library/react render and screen queries
